item.title: lambdaclass / cairo-rs
item.description:
Desc: cairo-rs is a Rust implementation of the Cairo VM. Cairo is a programming language for writing provable programs, where one party can prove to another that a certain computation was executed correctly. Cairo and similar proof systems can be used to provide scalability to blockchains.
Lang: Rust
Star: 251
